paragraphs: BTC funding flat at +0.002%/8h, OI +0.24% 24h, basis +0.06. Majors absorbing nothing on the bid. Breadth 12/20 24h, 3/20 7d — green tape on a flat weekly structure.

Alts running ahead of the index. NEAR +16% 24h on OI +28% with smart money +0.14 over 7d. GRASS +6.3% 24h on vol 7.4x. HYPE +30.7% 7d into a $62 ATH with $16M/day ETF inflows while BTC and ETH ETFs bleed. The rotation now lives inside the institutional vehicle, not just on CT.

Narrative-tracker downgraded Hyperliquid to FADE and called AI/DePIN PEAK · RIDE w/ trail. Perps positioning on HYPE directly contradicts the FADE call — top L/S +0.19 over 7d, smart money adding through the run. Price plus positioning wins commentary today.
market_sentiment.bias_line: Bias · ride the alts continuation in NEAR and HYPE with tight trails, fade the leverage extensions on the late entries.

perps.header_suffix: NEUTRAL · ACCUMULATION resolved into the rip
lines: Range past the 25% gate is the regime exiting INTO the breakout, not out of it.
Top L/S 1.89, +0.14 over 7d. Taker buy 50.19. Short liqs $2.4M vs 7d p75 $1.4M.
Missed CATALYST-BREAKOUT by 4pp on the +20% Tier 2 gate. Another +4% fires the regime.

narrative.header_suffix: AI agents + DePIN double 5/5 RIDE w/ trail
lines: Two PEAK narratives both leading with NEAR.
Promotion to PEAK names the late-cycle risk. Trail accordingly.
Alts breadth running ahead of flat majors, chop regime medium conviction.
Stablecoin supply +$5.7B 24h — dry powder building behind the move.
GRASS +29.8% same session — DePIN basket firing in parallel.
AIXBT named NEAR as the entry leg of the ZEC-HYPE-NEAR thematic basket today.
+44.78% 7d on top of a base, no near-term unlock concern.
Token-movers tagged BREAKOUT on the rank #36 / $909M turnover print.
Day 3 of continuation. Short squeeze cascading, sector tailwind active. Long with trail under the prior session's range low.
AI agents / DePIN narrative topping is the invalidator. RIDE w/ trail per narrative-tracker is the operating mode.
-1.50% 24h, +30.70% 7d on OI +41.74% 7d. Range 55% blocks ACCUMULATION on structure.
Funding now +0.008%/8h (7d avg +0.0007%). A push through +0.03%/8h fires MOMENTUM.
Top L/S 1.43, +0.19 over 7d. Smart money still adding through the run.
Narrative-tracker downgraded mindshare 4 → 3, second day with zero fresh threads.
Their read: top traders cutting exposure. Perps positioning data says the opposite.
AIXBT printed new ATH $62 with $16M/day ETF inflows.
BTC and ETH ETFs explicitly bleeding — capital reallocation inside the institutional wrapper.
June 6 unlock $575M, 15 days out — the named invalidator.
Grayscale accumulation and growing perp OI per AIXBT — three institutional actors stacked.
Hyperliquid leads the perp DEX category, no token-side competitor with comparable flow.
Continuation while smart money is in. Long with trail tight under the 7d low.
Cut size before June 4. The $575M unlock arrives faster than spot can absorb it.
Perps WATCH — +6.33% 24h, OI +27.09% 24h, vol 7.39x.
Top L/S 1.12, down 0.18 over 7d. Retail piling in while smart money trims.
Wait for top L/S to reverse, or a clean test of the breakout level holding on lower vol.
Funding -0.33%/8h on price reclaiming green, classic short pile-in.
OI 24h still building +12.45% — blocks SHORT-SQUEEZE per the scan.
Top L/S 0.95 collapsed -2.26 over 7d. Smart money already gone.
Wait for OI to flip negative on the next push, then size the squeeze.

risk.header_suffix: flush in progress, not yet flushed
lines: -10.24% 24h, OI -8.37% (1.6pp short of the -10% Tier 2 CAPITULATION gate).
Funding -0.10%/8h with top L/S collapsed -1.39 over 7d. Smart money exited already.
Wait for another OI tick down to fire CAPITULATION, then take the bounce.

watchlist.conflict_label: ETF catalyst real, no perps confirmation

lines: Token-call HIGH 10/10 — CBOE filed first memecoin + NFT ETF.
Not in the perps-scan universe — no positioning signal to join the catalyst.
21B+ vesting this month, 24% of total supply. Rally has to absorb that overhead.
Pass without a perps join. The April-27 mark-up exit-liquidity pattern risks repeating.
